ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., CERA) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "market_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("market_exchange") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "time_frequency" TEXT /* Time frequency of the price data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry" TEXT /* Parent industry if the industry is a sub-industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" TEXT /* Parent sector if the sector is a sub-sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., CEO, Headquarters, MarketCap) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., company website, financial API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_metadata_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
